query:
SELECT r.id, r.room_no, r.max_players, r.current_players, r.status, r.created_at,
  GROUP_CONCAT(p.nickname ORDER BY rp.seat_no SEPARATOR ', ') as players_list,
  COUNT(rp.id) as actual_player_count
FROM arena_rooms r
LEFT JOIN arena_room_players rp ON r.id = rp.room_id
LEFT JOIN players p ON rp.player_id = p.id
WHERE r.created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 HOUR)
GROUP BY r.id
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
